dialogueChunks.intro: {target_npc} hasn't been the same since they found that thing. They brought back an artifact from {location_hint} a week ago, and their behavior has been deteriorating ever since.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: At first it was just muttering and sleepless nights. Now they've barricaded themselves in their home, raving about voices and scratching symbols into the walls. {quest_ally} tried to help but was driven off. The artifact pulses with a faint light whenever {target_npc} speaks.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need to get {quest_focus} away from {target_npc} and find out what it is. {player_name}, can you help before {quest_threat} consumes them entirely?

playerResponses.text: I'll try to reach them and remove it.
Where exactly did they find it?

dialogueChunks.intro: Half the settlement woke screaming last night. The same nightmare: darkness, a hum from underground, and a terrible presence watching from {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} is one of the affected. They describe {quest_focus} as vivid and identical across every victim. This isn't coincidence: something near {location} is projecting these visions. The {enemy_type} in the area have been behaving erratically too.
dialogueChunks.outro: People are afraid to sleep, {player_name}. We need to find what's causing {quest_threat} and put an end to it before the whole settlement falls apart.

playerResponses.text: I'll track down whatever is doing this.
Nightmares are just dreams. They'll pass.

dialogueChunks.intro: Three of our people have gone feral. They fled into the wilds near {location_hint}, snarling and refusing to recognize anyone. It happened overnight.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} examined the water they'd been drinking and found traces of something unnatural: {quest_item} residue that shouldn't be in our supply. The {enemy_type} may have contaminated the source deliberately. {target_npc} thinks a cure is possible, but needs samples from the contamination site.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_focus} are still out there, lost to {quest_threat}. {player_name}, find the source and bring back what {target_npc} needs to brew a cure.

playerResponses.text: I'll get the samples and save them.
Are they dangerous in this state?
